## Summary

Describe what changed and why

## Validation

List the commands, notebook cells, or checks you ran

## Notes For Review

Call out anything that needs special attention

## Checklist

- [ ] I pulled the latest `main` into this branch before opening this PR
- [ ] I only changed files related to this task
- [ ] If I added a pure exploration notebook, I configured it in `.gitattributes` for automatic output clearing on commit
- [ ] I ran the relevant project checks for this change
